name: ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18 (2025)
description: The ultimate gaming laptop for 2025. Powered by the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 Laptop GPU and Intel Core Ultra 9 Processor 275HX with 24 cores, this beast dominates every AAA title and creative workload. Features an 18-inch 2.5K (2560x1600) ROG Nebula HDR Mini LED display with 2000+ dimming zones, 240Hz refresh rate, and 100% DCI-P3. Storage is a blistering 2TB + 2TB M.2 NVMe PCIe 4.0 SSD in RAID 0. ROG Intelligent Cooling with Tri-Fan Technology and Conductonaut Extreme liquid metal on both CPU and GPU keeps thermals in check at full tilt. Running Windows 11 Home.

name: Lenovo Legion Pro 5i Gen 9 (16-inch)
description: Dominate with the Lenovo Legion Pro 5i Gen 9. Powered by an Intel Core i9-14900HX processor and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 GPU with 8GB GDDR6, it crushes 1440p gaming with ease. The 16-inch 2.5K (2560x1600) IPS display runs at 165Hz for fluid, tear-free gameplay. Backed by 32GB DDR5 RAM, 1TB NVMe SSD, Lenovo AI Engine+ for intelligent thermal management, and a full-size keyboard with per-key RGB. Features Dolby Atmos audio, Wi-Fi 6E, and a MUX Switch for direct GPU output for maximum performance in competitive play.

name: MacBook Pro 14-inch (M3 Pro)
description: Apple's most capable 14-inch laptop. The M3 Pro chip with 12-core CPU and 18-core GPU delivers extraordinary performance for video editors, developers, and 3D artists. The stunning Liquid Retina XDR display with ProMotion offers 1000 nits sustained brightness, P3 wide color, and True Tone. 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, and up to 18 hours of battery life. Supports up to two external displays, Thunderbolt 4, HDMI 2.1, and SD card reader. Now available in a gorgeous Space Black finish.

name: MacBook Air M2
description: Completely redesigned around Apple's M2 chip. At just 11.3mm thin and 2.7 pounds, it packs a brilliant 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display, 1080p FaceTime HD camera, and a four-speaker sound system into a silent fanless design. With 8GB unified memory, 256GB SSD, and up to 18 hours of battery life, it is perfect for students and professionals who need all-day performance. Available in Midnight, Starlight, Silver, and Space Gray.

name: MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Max)
description: The pinnacle of Apple laptop performance. The M3 Max chip with up to 16-core CPU, 40-core GPU, and 36GB unified memory handles extreme workflows — 8K video editing, 3D rendering, large ML models — without breaking a sweat. The 16.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display with 1000 nits sustained and 1600 nits peak HDR brightness is the best display on any Mac notebook. With 1TB SSD and up to 22 hours battery life, this is the definitive desktop-replacement laptop. Now available in stunning Space Black.

name: Dell XPS 13 (2024)
description: The Dell XPS 13 2024 redefines ultraportable computing. Powered by Intel Core Ultra 7 with Intel Arc graphics and 16GB LPDDR5x RAM in a machined aluminum chassis weighing just 2.6 pounds. The 13.4-inch InfinityEdge display is available in FHD+, QHD+, or OLED options. With 512GB PCIe Gen 4 SSD, Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 5.4, and a 1080p webcam, this is the ideal ultrabook for professionals who demand elegance and power in equal measure. Up to 15 hours of battery life.

name: Business Ultrabook Pro
description: The perfect business companion built for all-day productivity. Intel Core i5 13th Gen, 16GB DDR5 RAM, and 512GB NVMe SSD handle demanding office workloads effortlessly. The 14-inch Full HD IPS display with anti-glare coating and 400-nit brightness is comfortable in any environment. At just 1.4kg with a magnesium alloy chassis, military-grade drop resistance, Intel Wi-Fi 6E, and 15 hours of battery life, this ultrabook is engineered for the road warrior.

name: Custom Gaming PC — High End (Core i9 / RTX 4080 Super)
description: The ultimate custom-built gaming rig for uncompromising 4K performance. Anchored by an NVIDIA RTX 4080 Super GPU and Intel Core i9-14900K with 24 cores running up to 6.0GHz, paired with 32GB DDR5 6000MHz RAM and 1TB PCIe Gen 4 NVMe SSD. A 360mm all-in-one liquid cooling loop keeps thermals pristine under full load. The tempered glass tower with full RGB iCUE lighting makes as much of a visual statement as it does a performance one. Ships with Windows 11 Pro pre-installed and fully optimized by our engineers.

name: Mid-Range Gaming PC (Ryzen 5 / RTX 4060 Ti)
description: The sweet spot between price and performance. Built around an NVIDIA RTX 4060 Ti and AMD Ryzen 5 7600 processor, this mid-range powerhouse handles 1440p gaming at high settings with ease. 16GB DDR5 5600MHz RAM ensures smooth multitasking, while the 512GB PCIe Gen 4 SSD delivers fast load times. Pre-installed with Windows 11 Home and housed in a compact ATX case with tempered glass panel. The perfect first gaming PC or upgrade for casual-to-competitive gamers.

name: SFF Gaming Build — NCASE M1 (Ryzen 7 7800X3D / RTX 4070 Ti)
description: Maximum power in minimum space. This small form factor build inside the legendary NCASE M1 chassis packs an RTX 4070 Ti and AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D — one of the best gaming CPUs ever made — into a chassis smaller than most shoeboxes. 32GB DDR5 RAM and 1TB NVMe SSD round out a system that punches way above its weight. A 240mm AIO liquid cooler keeps temps in check. Perfect for LAN parties, living room setups, or anyone who refuses to sacrifice performance for a cleaner desk.

name: SFF Office PC Build
description: A whisper-quiet compact PC engineered for office environments. Intel Core i5 13th Gen handles all productivity workloads effortlessly, backed by 16GB DDR4 RAM and a 512GB SSD. Integrated Intel UHD Graphics supports dual 4K monitors for a spacious workflow. The ultra-compact 20x20x30cm chassis fits neatly behind any monitor or under a desk. Near-silent fan design and 80 Plus Gold power supply make it the ideal office machine.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard — Full RGB (Cherry MX Brown)
description: A full-size mechanical keyboard built to elevate your game. Cherry MX Brown switches deliver satisfying tactile feedback — responsive enough for competitive gaming, comfortable enough for all-day typing. Per-key RGB backlighting with 16.8 million colors and 20 preset lighting effects. Aircraft-grade aluminum frame, dedicated media controls, and a detachable USB-C cable complete the package. N-key rollover and anti-ghosting ensure no keystroke is ever missed.

name: Corsair K57 RGB Wireless Keyboard
description: The freedom of wireless without compromise. The Corsair K57 RGB delivers ultra-fast SLIPSTREAM wireless at sub-1ms input response — indistinguishable from wired. Low-profile keys with per-key RGB and a shorter actuation point ideal for rapid gaming inputs. Up to 20 hours battery life, USB-C fast charging, and full Corsair iCUE software integration for deep macro and lighting customization.

name: Wireless Gaming Mouse — 20K DPI (PixArt 3395)
description: Precision without limits. The PixArt 3395 optical sensor tracks with up to 20,000 DPI accuracy on virtually any surface. A 1000Hz USB polling rate ensures zero-lag responsiveness, while the lightweight 69g ergonomic body reduces fatigue during extended sessions. Eight programmable buttons, 70-hour battery life, and 2.4GHz wireless connectivity make this the complete package for competitive players. Per-zone RGB lighting syncs with your full setup.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: The productivity mouse, perfected. The MX Master 3S features Logitech's 8,000 DPI Darkfield sensor, tracking accurately on virtually any surface including glass. Quiet Click technology delivers 90% less click noise without sacrificing feel. MagSpeed electromagnetic scrolling covers 1,000 lines per second. Connect to up to 3 devices via Bluetooth or Logi Bolt and switch instantly. Pair with Logi Options+ for app-specific customizations, Flow cross-computer control, and Smart Actions.

name: SteelSeries Arctis Pro Wireless
description: The pinnacle of wireless gaming audio. Hi-Res certified speakers with a 10–40,000Hz range deliver studio-quality audio. Dual-wireless technology combines ultra-low latency 2.4GHz wireless and Bluetooth simultaneously — game on your PC while taking calls on your phone. The ClearCast bidirectional mic provides broadcast-quality voice clarity with exceptional background noise cancellation. Dual swappable battery system means you never run out of power. DTS Headphone:X v2.0 creates true 360-degree surround sound.

name: Logitech G733 Lightspeed Wireless Headset
description: Lightweight, colourful, and incredibly capable at just 278g. LIGHTSPEED wireless delivers a rock-solid lag-free connection up to 20 metres away. Blue VO!CE microphone with AI-powered background noise filtering produces broadcast-quality clarity. PRO-G 40mm drivers deliver deep bass, crystal highs, and warm mids. Up to 29 hours of battery life on a single charge. Available in white, black, lilac, and blue. Full RGB lighting via Logitech G HUB.

name: EcoFlow DELTA 2 Portable Power Station (1024Wh)
description: Be prepared for anything with the EcoFlow DELTA 2. A 1024Wh LFP battery with a 3000+ charge cycle lifespan outlasts competitors by years. The 1800W AC output (2400W surge) powers refrigerators, power tools, and more. X-Stream technology charges from 0–80% in just 50 minutes via AC. Eleven output ports including four AC outlets, two USB-C (100W each), and a car socket handle all devices simultaneously. Smart EcoFlow app integration lets you monitor usage, schedule charging, and set backup triggers remotely.

name: EcoFlow River 2 Portable Power Station (256Wh)
description: The most portable power station in EcoFlow's lineup. A 256Wh LFP battery in a compact 3.5kg body — light enough to take anywhere. Despite its size it delivers 300W AC output (600W surge with X-Boost). Charges from zero to full in just one hour via AC, or combine with solar for off-grid power. Six output ports including USB-C 60W, USB-A, and AC outlets. EcoFlow app offers real-time monitoring and smart charging controls. The world's first portable power station with TÜV Rheinland certification.

name: Starlink Standard Kit Gen 3
description: High-speed satellite internet, available almost anywhere on Earth. The Starlink Gen 3 Standard Kit delivers 100–250 Mbps download speeds with low latency, enabling 4K streaming, video calls, and online gaming from locations traditional ISPs can never reach. The compact weather-resistant dish self-orients automatically and connects to the included Wi-Fi 6 router. No contracts — cancel any time. Setup takes under 30 minutes. Ideal for rural homes, remote cabins, farms, and anyone tired of unreliable broadband.

name: Starlink Business Kit
description: Enterprise-grade satellite connectivity for businesses that cannot afford downtime. Starlink Business delivers priority network access with download speeds up to 500 Mbps and latency as low as 20ms. The high-performance dish handles extreme weather and delivers consistent throughput for offices, maritime vessels, and remote industrial sites. Includes a business-class Wi-Fi 6 router, rugged pole mount, and extended cable options. Backed by a commercial SLA and dedicated business support line.
